query: SELECT ac.id, ac.adjustmentRequestId, ac.autorId, ac.comentario, ac.createdAt, u.name as autor_name FROM adjustment_comments ac LEFT JOIN users u ON ac.autorId = u.id ORDER BY ac.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
